_fixture: PRD-208 negative — programmatic factory rejects pre-emit when transform returns a node whose `data` block is missing the required `text` field. Validates that PRD-208-R3's block-level validation (per amendment A3) catches malformed PRD-102-R4 blocks before they reach the framework.
_negative_reason: violates PRD-102-R4 (data block missing required `text`); PRD-208-R3 (per amendment A3) requires the factory to validate every content block against its applicable PRD-102 block schema before passing the node to the framework; expected unrecoverable error per PRD-208-R12 with non-zero build exit.

user_supplied_transform_returns.title: Widget Foo
user_supplied_transform_returns.summary: Catalog entry for the Widget Foo product line.

_scenario.factory_behavior: transform-wrapper validates content[0] against schemas/102/block-data.schema.json; required field `text` is missing; factory throws per PRD-208-R12 citing node `id`, content-array index 0, and the JSON-Schema violation 'must have required property text'.
